__doc__: Layer 2: Raw System State Dump — kernel snapshot, mounts, process table
name: ChaosOS :: Layer 2 — Raw System State Dump

execution_sequence.name: Dump process descriptors
execution_sequence.command: ps aux --sort=-%cpu 2>/dev/null | head -30 || ps aux | head -30

execution_sequence.name: Dump mount points
execution_sequence.command: mount -v 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1,$3,$5}' | column -t || cat /proc/mounts 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1,$2,$3}' | head -20

execution_sequence.name: Detect display server conflict (Wayland/X11/Quartz)
execution_sequence.command: echo 'DISPLAY='$DISPLAY; echo 'WAYLAND='$WAYLAND_DISPLAY; loginctl show-session $(loginctl | grep -m1 seat | awk '{print $1}') -p Type 2>/dev/null || echo 'SESSION_TYPE_UNKNOWN'

execution_sequence.name: Dump syscall table snapshot
execution_sequence.command: strace -e trace=process ls / 2>&1 | head -20 || echo 'STRACE_UNAVAILABLE'; cat /proc/version 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO_PROC_VERSION'
